titleStmt.title: SII 7.194: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 194. (A.R. No. 27-E of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE JOGI-MATHA ON THE HILL AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
saṁbhavē . svasti śrī . vijayādbudaya śakhavarusa 1397 varttamāna manmathasaṁvaścarada māga
sudda 1 vu guruvāradalu śrīmaṁmāhārājādhirāja rājaparamēsvara śrī vīrapratāpa
prahuḍa virūpākṣamahārāyaru catusamūdramadhya ratnasiṁhāsanarūḍharāgi
citaisutiralu Avara nirūpadiṁda mahāpradhāna siṁgaṁṇadaṁṇāykaru sakalarā
ṇeyagaḷanu pratipālisuttiralu Avara nirūpadiṁda viṭarasavoḍeyaru maṁgalū
ru bārakūra rājyagaḷa pālisutiha kāladalli ĀviṭhapaOḍeyarukaṭṭaḷeyavaru baṁgaru
caUṭaru sahavāgi rājyavanū Āḷuvakāladalli maṁgalūrarājyakke Adistanavaha
kadireya sthānikaru rāvaḷapaḷiyanu gaṇapaṁṇāḷuvanu rāyarasēnabōvanu go
mmasēnabōvanu yiṁtī nālvaru sēnabōvarū taṁmoḷēkastarāgi maṁgaḷanāthavoḍeya
rige koṭṭabhūmiya śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare Ā ṭhāvina(vina) catusīmeya vivara
kaivaṭṭala keṟeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu tāvareya keṟeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu baḍagaṇa beṭadiṁda
teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyoḷaguḷḷa hittilu nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi
sidha sādhyaveṁba Aṣṭabhōgatējaśvāmyasahavāgi maṁgaḷanātaOḍeyara pareyāgi kadire
yā suddhasivastanadali bhāḷurellakku rāvaḷupaḷiyaru nālvaru sēnabōvaru Aṁtu Ayivaru Ā bhū
miyanū dhārāpūrvikevāgi dhāreyeṟadu koṭṭevu mattaṁ śrīmatu maṁgaḷanāthavo
ḍeyarige bayalamaneya rāyarasēnabōvanu māḍida dharmmada vivara nantarāḷamūlaka
ṇakaṁ beṭṭina hittila catusīmeya vivara naḍuvaṇa maneya mūḍaṇa hoḷeyiṁda
mūḍa jaina sēnabōvana maneya teṁkaṇa vōṇiyiṁda teṁka bayalamaneya hittila
paḍuvaṇa sālaṁda paḍuva kaṇakaṁ beṭṭina mēlaṇagaddeya baḍagaṇa bageyiṁda baḍaga
yi catusīmeyoḷaguḷḷa hittilanu naṁna svarcūyiṁda maṁgaḷanāthavoḍeyarige dharmmakke
dhāre yeṟadu koṭṭenu yidakke naṁma sisāṁtara tappeU śrīmatu maṁgaḷanāthavoḍe
yaru māḍisida yeraḍu tōṭadoḷage caṁdranāthaOḍeya sisyaru maṁgaḷanāthaOḍeya
rū yi kadireyali [Āḷu] Arasugaḷu yi yeraḍu tōṭavanu rakṣisi A phalabhōgadiṁda gō
rakṣanāthana nivēdya beḷaku caṁdranāthana nivēdya beḷaku varuṣake bhikṣe Ayanakke baṁda sameya
kke Oṁdu hottina Aṁnava koḍuUdu maṁgaḷanāthaOḍeyaru māḍida dharmma . dānapā
lanayōrmmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāṁ svarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
svadattāṁ paradattaṁ vā yō hārēti vasuṁdharā[ṁ .*] ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāya
tē krimiḥ . yi dhar(ṁ)mmakke Āru kelaṁbaru Aḷupidavaru vāraṇāsiyalli sahasraka
pileya koṁda pāpakke hōharu . yī dharmmava pālistavaru vāraṇāsiyalli sahasrakapile
ya dānava māḍida puṁṇyava naiduvaru . subhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 7.194 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
